---
title: "Research"
format: html
reference-location: section
page-layout: full
---

# Working papers


# Publications

::: {.paper}
- ***Title*** {.paper-title} (with Coauthor Name)
[Paper](files/jmp.pdf){.paper-link} · [Slides](files/jmp_slides.pdf){.paper-link}

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" #abs-jmp}
- Abstract 
aaa
:::
:::

# Works in progress
